name: Swiftness
text: Move any hero up to 3 spaces for free.

name: Security
text: Ignore all hits from one attack.

name: Search
text: Draw 2 items from the bag and place them in your current location.

name: Share
text: Trade items between any two heroes anywhere on the board.

name: Insight
text: Look at the top 3 cards of the Monster Deck and rearrange them.

name: Restoration
text: Set the active player's AP back to 4.
